title: Irish Soda Bread
description: A classic Irish bread recipe that is easy to make and delicious to eat. Perfect for serving with butter or jam.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the sugar, butter, and warm water to the dry ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-10 minutes.
5. Shape the dough into a round loaf and place it on a baking sheet.
6. Cut a cross in the top of the loaf and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown.
7. Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
